name: crm_add_tag
description: Tag a contact in the native CRM (Supabase contact_tags table per Stack V4). Replaces the deprecated `ghl_add_tag` tool. Uses upsert semantics — calling with the same (contact_id, tag) pair twice is a no-op. Returns the persisted tag row.

source.description: Origin of the tag assignment. Example: 'agent:sales-enablement', 'workflow:onboarding-e2e-v2'.
